mapper.select: SELECT fs.seller_favorite_id, fs.user_id, fs.seller_id, fs.created_at, s.company_name FROM favorites_seller fs JOIN sellers s ON fs.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE fs.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY fs.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO favorites_seller (user_id, seller_id) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{seller_id})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorites_seller WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND seller_id = #{seller_id}
